retrieved_result: What is a CDHP? What is a CDHP? CDHP stands for consumer-directed health plan. There are several different types of CDHPs — some that can be paired with an individual plan and some that must be paired with a group plan though an employer. What all CDHPs have in common, though, is a personal healthcare account used
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses health plans (CDHP) rather than database query optimization; unrelated topic.

history.title: What is a CDHP?
history.description: What is a CDHP? CDHP stands for consumer-directed health plan. There are several different types of CDHPs — some that can be paired with an individual plan and some that must be paired with a group plan though an employer. What all CDHPs have in common, though, is a personal healthcare account used
